summary: Large matching-progress PR with a final slice touching gm, gr, it, and mn code. The loaded diff changes a gm_1601 header parameter type, extends grHomeRun ground variable typing, adds an itlugia switch default, and rewrites mn_80230198 from generated-looking branch/goto control flow into a switch with a bounded loop. PR body claims 14 matched and 8 failed functions, while a later comment says the work was split into subsystem draft PRs and some commits were dropped because equivalent or better decompilations were already upstream.

key_files.role: Reworked mn_80230198 control flow, renamed arg2 to mode, changed loop counter to int, retained PAD_STACK(8), and normalized float suffixes in AnimLoopSettings initializers.
evidence_refs: diff: mnmainrule.c mn_80230198 branch/goto ladder replaced by switch(mode) and for (i = 0; i < 5; i++)

key_files.role: Expanded grHomeRun_GroundVars layout with offset comments, pad_D4, and an xE8 bitfield union.
evidence_refs: diff: grHomeRun_GroundVars adds gp+C4 through gp+E8 comments, pad_D4[0x14], and xE8_b0..xE8_b7 bitfields

key_files.role: Adjusted fn_80161C90 prototype second parameter from s32 to int.
evidence_refs: diff: fn_80161C90(MatchEnd*, s32, u16*) changed to fn_80161C90(MatchEnd*, int, u16*)

key_files.role: Added an explicit default case to a switch in it_802D24A0.
evidence_refs: diff: it_802D24A0 switch adds default: break

what_changed.text: mn_80230198 was simplified from an option variable plus gotos and range tests into a switch over mode, with cases 0, 2, and 4 executing frame lookup and cases 1, 3, 5, and 6 doing nothing.
The mn_80230198 loop condition changed from i != 5 to i < 5, while still selecting between mn_803EC770 and mn_803EC734 entries and passing the chosen settings to mn_8022ED6C.
The local parameter name arg2 became mode in mn_80230198.
evidence_refs: diff: void mn_80230198(HSD_GObj* gobj, HSD_JObj* jobj, u8 mode)

what_changed.text: AnimLoopSettings initializers in mnmainrule.c changed float suffix spelling from lowercase f to uppercase F.
evidence_refs: diff: mn_803EC734 and mn_803EC770 initializer changes

what_changed.text: grHomeRun_GroundVars received more explicit layout information, including offset comments, typed padding, and an xE8 byte/bitfield union.
fn_80161C90's header prototype was updated from s32 to int for the second parameter.
it_802D24A0 now has an explicit default: break in its switch before multiplying ip->x40_vel.z by multiplier.
A later issue comment says this broad PR was split into smaller draft PRs by subsystem and that some commits were dropped because upstream already had equivalent or better decompilations.

smart_moves.text: Converted generated-looking branch/goto control flow in mn_80230198 into a direct switch over the semantic mode parameter, matching the loaded standard's preference for canonical control flow when ordinary C expresses the dispatch.
Kept the repeated frame-range search as a natural bounded loop instead of unrolling it, consistent with natural-loop guidance.
Added typed ground-var layout rather than relying only on anonymous offsets for grHomeRun_GroundVars.
The author chose to split a broad multi-subsystem PR into smaller subsystem PRs for easier review.
evidence_refs: issue_comment: Split this PR into four smaller draft PRs by subsystem for easier review

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a decompiled branch ladder only selects a few valid modes, test a switch with grouped active and no-op cases before preserving gotos.
evidence_refs: diff: mn_80230198 replaces option/goto ladder with switch(mode)

decomp_lessons.lesson: For repeated table scans over animation settings, a natural for-loop can be the reviewable shape when the loop bounds and indexed table access are clear.
evidence_refs: diff: mn_80230198 scans mn_803EC770 and mn_803EC734 with for (i = 0; i < 5; i++)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovering a struct layout may involve adding explicit padding and bitfield union arms when the PR evidence identifies offsets and flag bits.
evidence_refs: diff: grHomeRun_GroundVars adds pad_D4[0x14] and xE8_b0..xE8_b7

decomp_lessons.lesson: Large multi-subsystem matching batches can become review-heavy; the PR author later routed the work into subsystem-specific draft PRs.
evidence_refs: issue_comment: split into #2402 ft, #2404 gr, #2405 gm+mn, #2406 it

naming_conventions.text: Local parameter arg2 in mn_80230198 was renamed to mode, a short semantic name supported by the switch dispatch over mode values.
grHomeRun_GroundVars kept address-style field names xC4, xC6, xC8, xCC, xD0, xE8 and bit names xE8_b0..xE8_b7 rather than inventing more semantic names.
Header signature cleanup used int rather than s32 for fn_80161C90's second parameter, but the PR slice does not explain the reason beyond the diff.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: mn_80230198 retained PAD_STACK(8), indicating a stack-shape matching tactic remained in the final diff.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The slice shows the tactic but does not include objdiff or adjacent-regression evidence specifically justifying PAD_STACK.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Switch grouping of cases 0, 2, and 4 versus no-op cases 1, 3, 5, and 6 is the main visible control-flow matching tactic.
The PR body reports 14 functions at ✓ 100% and 8 failed candidates, but the loaded diff only contains four changed files and does not include verifier output per touched function.
A bot report says GALE01 had no changes for one checked revision.
evidence_refs: issue_comment: decomp-dev[bot] Report for GALE01 (53a261a - faff6e1): No changes

review_feedback.text: No review comments were loaded for this PR slice.
The author later commented that the PR was split into four smaller draft PRs by subsystem for easier review.
The same comment says some commits were dropped because upstream already had equivalent or better decompilations.
evidence_refs: issue_comment: dropped lbAudioAx_800243F4, fn_800244F4, grOldPupupu_8021119C, fn_8023DAEC in mnnamenew.c

notes: The PR body lists many matched and failed functions across files not present in the final loaded diff, so broad matched-function claims are preserved as PR-body claims rather than independently accepted validation.
No inline review comments or reviewer intent are available.
The diff is small and concrete for the four changed files, but it does not include objdiff/checkdiff logs for individual tactics such as PAD_STACK.
The later author comment says the PR was closed in favor of split PRs, while metadata says the PR merged; both are recorded without inferring the exact repository workflow beyond the loaded evidence.
Function descriptions in the PR body may be generated text and are not used as source-of-truth path facts.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Replace generated mode branch ladders with grouped switch cases when supported
accepted_candidate_records.text: In mn_80230198, a generated-looking sequence of option tests and gotos was replaced by switch(mode), grouping active cases 0/2/4 and no-op cases 1/3/5/6. This is a PR-backed example of the canonical-control-flow standard.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use bounded table scans for animation setting selection
accepted_candidate_records.text: mn_80230198 keeps a natural for-loop over five animation setting slots while selecting from mn_803EC770 or mn_803EC734 based on frame range. This supports trying clean loops for repeated table checks before preserving generated branch shapes.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Split broad matching batches by subsystem for review
accepted_candidate_records.text: The author later split this broad matching PR into subsystem draft PRs for ft, gr, gm+mn, and it review, and dropped commits already covered upstream.

source_update_candidates.title: grHomeRun_GroundVars layout has pad_D4 and xE8 bitfield union in this PR slice
source_update_candidates.text: The diff expands struct grHomeRun_GroundVars with offset comments for xC4, xC6, xC8, xCC, xD0, adds pad_D4[0x14], and adds a union at xE8 with byte access and bitfields xE8_b0 through xE8_b7. Curator should verify against current source before promoting as a path fact.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is concrete diff evidence for a struct layout change, but current source may have evolved after PR #2345.

source_update_candidates.title: mn_80230198 uses mode dispatch for menu rule animation settings in this PR slice
source_update_candidates.text: The diff renames mn_80230198's third parameter to mode and dispatches cases 0, 2, and 4 to a frame-range scan over mn_803EC770 and mn_803EC734 before calling mn_8022ED6C. Curator should verify current code and any later PR #2405 changes before promoting.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful local behavior/path fact candidate, but the loaded slice does not include full current-source validation.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR body's full list of 14 matched functions as accepted validation from this slice; the final diff only shows four files and no per-function objdiff logs.
Do not infer reviewer approval or reviewer-requested changes; no review comments or reviews were loaded.
Do not treat PAD_STACK(8) as generally endorsed style from this PR; it appears in the diff without explicit verifier evidence in the loaded slice.
Do not promote generated function descriptions from the PR body as authoritative semantic documentation without current-source or subsystem evidence.
